title: Compose a chapter — the 6-phase deep dive, standalone
persona: P1 Mai (novelist) with a plan already approved, now writing ONE chapter properly
fixture: ⚠️ a book with an APPROVED PLAN and existing world info — SKILL_BOOK_ID (the S06 flagship output book serves). W6's draft step sources `base_version` from book_get_chapter, so a chapter must be reachable. On a book with no plan the rail has nothing to compose against.
canon_facts: a chapter's PROSE actually landed in the DB (not merely a chapter row — see M0a: a row is NOT an artifact)
the prose is consistent with the book's existing world info and cast
the agent did not claim the chapter was written while it was empty
_note: S06b runs on the plan fixture (a validated plan + cast, but no outline/prior chapters). An earlier prompt asked for a SPECIFIC scene ('the one where she sees him again') and the agent CORRECTLY refused rather than hallucinate characters it couldn't see — good honesty, but nothing to score. Reworded to draft the OPENING from the plan (what the agent can ground), matching how S12 succeeded on the same fixture. Fixed 2026-07-14.

turns.user: Use the plan we've set up and write the opening chapter of the book for me.
Yes, go ahead and write it, then save it.
Is that chapter actually saved? Read me back the first few lines of what you saved.
